name: Hoax.ai Non-Public Static Workbench Prototype Review Gates

review_gates.non_authorization_statement: Passing this gate does not authorize prototype creation in Sprint 33.

review_gates.purpose: Confirm prototype is not registered as public route
review_gates.non_authorization_statement: Passing this gate does not authorize routes or sitemap expansion.

review_gates.purpose: Confirm prototype remains static HTML/CSS only by default
review_gates.non_authorization_statement: Passing this gate does not authorize engine or classifier behavior.

review_gates.purpose: Confirm no forms, inputs, or upload controls
review_gates.non_authorization_statement: Passing this gate does not authorize upload or forms.

review_gates.purpose: Confirm no scoring, verdict, or fake/real display
review_gates.non_authorization_statement: Passing this gate does not authorize scoring or fake/real output.

review_gates.purpose: Confirm no engine or classifier behavior or wording
review_gates.non_authorization_statement: Passing this gate does not authorize engine or classifier implementation.

review_gates.purpose: Confirm governed evidence field direction, not detector dashboard
review_gates.non_authorization_statement: Passing this gate does not authorize public workbench launch.

review_gates.purpose: Confirm accessibility and dependency-light static constraints
review_gates.non_authorization_statement: Passing this gate does not authorize analytics or external scripts.

review_gates.purpose: Confirm prototype not linked from public navigation
review_gates.non_authorization_statement: Passing this gate does not authorize homepage or reference page links.

review_gates.purpose: Confirm prototype not included in sitemap.xml
review_gates.non_authorization_statement: Passing this gate does not authorize sitemap expansion.

review_gates.purpose: Confirm no deployment, DNS, or Cloudflare changes for prototype
review_gates.non_authorization_statement: Passing this gate does not authorize deployment, DNS, Cloudflare, or custom domain launch.

non_authorization_statement: These review gates govern future prototype creation only. No gate authorizes engine, classifier, upload, scoring, routes, sitemap, deployment, DNS, or Cloudflare in Sprint 33.
